name: Deckaster
tagline: Turn any project into a self-explanatory deck and a narrated, word-highlighted video.
problem: Designers and builders ship fast, but turning that work into a clear deck and video takes hours in slide and timeline editors.
users: Designers and "vibecoders" who are closest to the work and would rather keep building than spend an afternoon editing.
insight: If an agent can write the slides, it can write the narration, speak it, and sync the highlights automatically.
solution: One skill that runs five stages end-to-end, so you never touch a timeline editor.
how_it_works: An HTML-first, deterministic pipeline: extract style, generate a reveal.js deck, narrate with AI voice, then capture and render the video.

key_features.heading: On-brand
key_features.text: Pulls colors and fonts from your project automatically.

key_features.heading: Self-narrating
key_features.text: Writes and speaks a script that complements the slides.

key_features.heading: Karaoke sync
key_features.text: Highlights each word on the slide as it is spoken.

results.summary: From idea to explainer in minutes.

metrics.label: faster than hand-editing a narrated walkthrough

results.quote: It felt like the deck explained itself.

whats_next: In-slide motion accents and auto-animate transitions
cta: Point it at your project and get back a deck and a video.
